name: Low Fat Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 2+ tablespoons molasses (Modify to your own taste)
spices - 2-3 of your favorite cake spices (e.g., nutmeg, cinnamon, and ginger)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to approximately 400°F.
In a mixing bowl, add the whole wheat flour. Do not add the baking powder yet.
Add the crushed pineapple with its juice. Mix well.
Break the banana into chunks and mix it roughly with your mixing spoon into the flour mixture. Add the egg whites and enough water to achieve a thick batter (very thick or the fruit will sink). Stir in the molasses, spices, and raisins.
When these are mixed in, add the baking powder. Mix just until distributed; avoid overmixing to prevent the fizz from being knocked out of the cake.
Pour the batter into a 7-8 inch loose-bottomed cake tin, smooth the surface, and place it in the oven.
Bake for about 40 minutes. The cake is done when a knife inserted into it comes out clean.
Notes:
This recipe makes a very moist cake that can be kept for up to a week. It may tend to stick to older or cheaper bakeware.
